'''dhahodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylobioside|xylobioside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-h-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylobioside|xylobioside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhahodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæhedheth|dhæhedheth]] || [[word:dhæhedhej|dhæhedhej]] || [[word:dhæhedhesh|dhæhedhesh]] || [[word:dhæhedhe|dhæhedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhahohodhoth|dhahohodhoth]] || [[word:dhahohodhoj|dhahohodhoj]] || [[word:dhahohodhosh|dhahohodhosh]] || [[word:dhahohodho|dhahohodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhahodhoth|dhahodhoth]] || [[word:dhahodhoj|dhahodhoj]] || [[word:dhahodhosh|dhahodhosh]] || [[word:dhahodho|dhahodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhahofdhoth|dhahofdhoth]] || [[word:dhahofdhoj|dhahofdhoj]] || [[word:dhahofdhosh|dhahofdhosh]] || [[word:dhahofdhof|dhahofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhahodhotho|dhahodhotho]] || [[word:dhahodhojo|dhahodhojo]] || [[word:dhahodhosho|dhahodhosho]] || [[word:dhahodhoko|dhahodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhahodhoth|dhahodhoth]] || [[word:dhahodhoj|dhahodhoj]] || [[word:dhahodhosh|dhahodhosh]] || [[word:dhahodho|dhahodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhahodhothol|dhahodhothol]] || [[word:dhahodhojol|dhahodhojol]] || [[word:dhahodhoshol|dhahodhoshol]] || [[word:dhahodhokol|dhahodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhahodhothotho|dhahodhothotho]] || [[word:dhahodhojojo|dhahodhojojo]] || [[word:dhahodhoshosho|dhahodhoshosho]] || [[word:dhahodhoko|dhahodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhahodhothon|dhahodhothon]] || [[word:dhahodhojon|dhahodhojon]] || [[word:dhahodhoshon|dhahodhoshon]] || [[word:dhahodhokon|dhahodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhahodhothoro|dhahodhothoro]] || [[word:dhahodhojoro|dhahodhojoro]] || [[word:dhahodhoshoro|dhahodhoshoro]] || [[word:dhahodhokoro|dhahodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
